# 🎂 Happy Birthday Website Template

[![Live Demo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Live-Demo-ffc3d9?style=for-the-badge&logo=vercel&logoColor=white)](https://happybirthdaytooyouu.vercel.app)

A beautiful, interactive birthday website designed with a soft pastel aesthetic, balloon animations, and a magical entry experience.

## ✨ Features
- **Magical Entry Screen**: "Making a Wish" overlay with background music initialization.
- **Premium Animations**: Floating balloons, confetti, and smooth fade-ins.
- **Interactive Gift**: A "Gift Card" pop-up to replace simple text reveals.
- **Responsive Design**: Looks great on both mobile and desktop.
- **Personalized**: Custom message and signature.

---

## �️ How to Use This Template

This is a ready-to-use template for creating a beautiful birthday website.

### Step 1: Fork this Repository
**[Click here to Fork this Repository directly](https://github.com/KEX001/Birthday-Template/fork)**

This creates a copy of the project in your own GitHub account.

### Step 2: Customize
You can edit the files directly on GitHub or download them to your computer.

*   **`index.html`**:
    *   Change "Meri Princess" to your special person's name.
    *   Update the "Gift Cards" message in the hidden `<div>`.
*   **`styles.css`**: Change colors (`--primary`, `--accent`) to their favorite colors.
*   **Audio**: Replace `hero.mp3` with their favorite song.

### Step 3: Deploy (Go Live!)

#### Option A: Vercel (Recommended) &rarr; [vercel.com](https://vercel.com)
1.  Login with GitHub and click **"Add New Project"**.
2.  Select your forked `Birthday-Template` repo and click **"Deploy"**.

#### Option B: GitHub Pages
1.  Go to your repository **Settings**.
2.  On the left sidebar, click **Pages** (under the "Code and automation" section).
3.  Under **"Build and deployment"**, select `main` branch and click **Save**.
4.  Your site will be live at: `https://<your-username>.github.io/Birthday-Template/`

---

## 🎵 Note on Music
Most browsers block audio from playing automatically to prevent annoyance. That's why this site uses an **"Enter Celebration"** button. This ensures the music plays 100% of the time on all devices (iPhone, Android, PC) when she enters the site.
